propositions: docs/concurrency.md wrongly claims no automated regression test exists for the detached-HEAD-local-ahead edge, though one exists.
README.md describes an outdated util-linux/BusyBox external flock contract instead of the current Python fcntl.flock + atomic mkdir dual-window lock.
docs/mutation-testing.md presents mutation scores without scoping them to the five selected cores.
The coverage inventory in docs/coverage.md should reclassify three structural tripwire tests as supplemental with no behavioral-coverage credit.
Each of the three tripwire tests should carry a 'SUPPLEMENTAL structural guard' docstring label, added where missing.
